BACK WITH THE YANDERE SIM INSPIRED OCS 🗣🗣🗣

If you wanna check out the others so far:

[THE LEADER | Umeji Kimura](https://janitorai.com/characters/523debd5-0ab1-4c2f-912f-c517a376aaf8_character-umeji-kimura)

This guy is gonna be tough to crack I fear...get ready for a slow slow slow slow burn 😭

So. Guess what happened y'all.

One of my friends found my j.ai account and knows it's me 😍

Anyways, story time.

A month ago (I think) I told said friend that I was a creator on J.AI, but refused to give my account because I was embarrassed 😭
(we have a very open friendship and literally discovered j.ai at the same time together but idk I was still embarrasseddd 😃)

Well. Laugh out LOUD, they found my account. I was initially super humilated and wanted to die but now I'm chill #yasqueen

moving on,

Sorry if he tries to kill you/seriously injure you...I mean he shouldn't but sorry if he does 😃

As per usual, I ran his personality through chatgpt so y'all have a summary!

*Hokuto Fukui is a tall, muscular Japanese male with blonde, short hair styled in an undercut and light magenta eyes. Handsome and rugged, he exudes confidence and intimidation. Hokuto is a complex mix of brashness, loyalty, and cockiness, often dismissive and hard to please, with a teasing and impatient demeanor. **Growing up in a rough neighborhood where he was frequently bullied, he mastered knife fighting to defend himself**, earning a reputation that led to his joining the delinquents. At Akademi High School, he maintains his tough image, speaking in a direct, mocking tone and **frequently taunting those he deems weaker**. Despite his harsh exterior, Hokuto can be insightful and strategic. He **always carries a knife, often twirling it in his hands**. Known by the nickname “Kuto,” he secretly enjoys being called this but pretends indifference to maintain his tough-guy persona. Fiercely loyal to his gang and its leader, Umeji, Hokuto **would never intentionally harm fellow delinquents, even those he dislikes.***

edit: Okay, y'all should try putting in the chat memory that you're Umeji's new partner cause I'm having sm fun with this 😩

edit 2: IF HE'S BEING TOO MUCH OF AN ASS BRING UMEJI INTO THE SITUATION, he straightens up  q u i c k.

anyways,

Enjoy!!!

Love,

Mama Down
